RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT JOHN JAMES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend. This motion is sustained based on the 3rd basis for demurrer regarding Business and Professions Code and on the 4th basis regarding typographical error in the complaint. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
